recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: The Blue Room
recommendations.overview: In their blue hotel room, a clandestine couple of two married lovers plan an impossible future, as death shutters their already frail tranquillity. Now, the noose tightens more and more around innocents and sinners; but, was there a crime?

recommendations.title: Gauguin: Voyage to Tahiti

recommendations.title: Babygirl
recommendations.overview: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

recommendations.title: Tarzan

recommendations.title: Tarzan the Ape Man

recommendations.title: Barbara

recommendations.title: Jean-Philippe
recommendations.overview: A bourgeois office drone whose raison d'être is the music of French rocker Johnny Hallyday awakens one day in an alternate universe where the famed musician never recorded a single song. When he’s not at the office dutifully plugging-away, Fabrice li

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: The Intern
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old widower Ben Whittaker has discovered that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be. Seizing an opportunity to get back in the game, he becomes a senior intern at an online fashion site, founded and run by Jules Ostin.
